description_long: This is a military-style SUV with an olive drab exterior, featuring a prominent white star insignia on the hood and a smaller star on the side, reminiscent of classic Willys MB Jeeps used in World War II. The vehicle has an open-top design with two front seats and a rear bench, all upholstered in a muted green color. The dashboard is simple, with visible gauges and a steering wheel, and the windshield is upright and split in the middle. The SUV is equipped with rugged, thick-tread tires, a spare tire mounted on the rear, and a jerry can attached to the back for extra fuel. The body is boxy and utilitarian, with flat fenders and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing function over form. Metal components dominate the construction, with some rubber and fabric elements for the seats and tires.
description: A military-style, olive drab SUV with open-top seating, white star insignia, rugged tires, and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat grille, round headlights, white star on the hood, and upright windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cabin, two front seats, rear bench, and side star insignia.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the spare tire, jerry can, simple rear lights, and rear bench seat.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cabin, seating, and utilitarian wheel arches.
attribute_wheel_design: simple solid wheels with six-lug pattern and thick, rugged tires
